title: Translation Units, Declarations, Diagnostics, and Linking · Memory Retrieval
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the warning-clean multi-file interface dossier contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for warning-clean multi-file interface dossier after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict macro expansion, conditional compilation, include guards, and header ownership before translation.
Distinguish declarations, tentative and full definitions, linkage, compatible types, and one-definition responsibilities.
Use complete prototypes and compatible parameter and return types across every caller boundary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Preprocessing Boundaries · changed case · Review Preprocessing Boundaries
steps.instruction:
